title: Check how long you can stay on an AEWV :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Check how long you can stay on an AEWV
Use this tool to find out the total amount of time you can stay in New Zealand on 1 or more Accredited Employer Work Visas (AEWVs) based on your current job.
To use this tool, you will need to know:
- your Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO) skill level
- if your job is on the list of the National Occupation List (NOL) used for an AEWV
- if your job is on the Green List
- when you applied, or will apply, for your AEWV.
Find your job's skill level
National Occupation List occupations used for an AEWV
Green List roles — jobs we need people for in New Zealand
For more information about how long you can stay and how we count time on an AEWV:
How long you can stay on an AEWV
- ANZSCO is the Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO). It groups jobs together into 'occupations' that have similar tasks and responsibilities and grades them according to skill level. ANZSCO skill levels range from 1 to 5, with 1 being the most skilled and 5 being less skilled. Find your ANZSCO skill level
ANZSCO is the Australian and New Zealand Standard Classification of Occupations (ANZSCO). It groups jobs together into 'occupations' that have similar tasks and responsibilities and grades them according to skill level. ANZSCO skill levels range from 1 to 5, with 1 being the most skilled and 5 being less skilled.
